text.tspan: u2022 size-based: roll when active reaches N MB
u2022 time-based: roll every N hours
u2022 count-based: roll every N records
u2022 size: keep last N GB total
u2022 time: keep last N days
u2022 LWM: keep until snapshot covers them (Raft)
u2022 compaction: per-key retention (Kafka log compaction)
